title: ICICI Bank International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Bank International Enterprises is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the ICICI Bank International Enterprises family as a Credit Analyst in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!
